# Game Between The Lines Casino Assets

This directory contains only the cropped image assets currently used by the casino-floor replay UI. They are derived from:

- 2D Top-Down Pixel Art Tileset: Casino
- Creator: Jephed, Game Between The Lines
- Source: https://gamebetweenthelines.com/top-down-pixel-art-tileset-casino/
- Itch.io: https://gamebetweenthelines.itch.io/2d-top-down-pixel-art-tileset-casino

The creator states that the asset pack is free for commercial and non-commercial use. Credit suggestion from the asset page: "Jephed, Game Between The Lines, https://gamebetweenthelines.com/"

Bundling policy for this repo: do not commit the full source pack by default. Add only cropped assets that the replay UI imports.
